result.stdout:
.NET Core CLI tools for the Karambolo.AspNetCore.Bundling library 3.9.1+36150ca931463c525cc64ee0ce895983c6ee2a7f

Usage: dotnet bundle [options]

Options:
  -s|--sources <SOURCES>           Specifies where to look for bundle configurations. You may specify multiple values separated with comma. Possible values: None, ConfigFile, AppAssembly, Default, OutputAssemblies. Default: ConfigFile,AppAssembly.
  -f|--config-file <CONFIG_FILE>   The location of the bundle configuration file. (Ignored when ConfigFile source is not enabled by the '--sources' option.) See https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/aspnet/core/client-side/bundling-and-minification#configure-bundling-and-minification
  -m|--mode <MODE>                 Enable production optimizations or development hints. Possible values: Production, Development. Default: Production.
  -p|--project <PROJECT>           The location of the project directory or project file whose web assets needs to be bundled.
  --framework <FRAMEWORK>          The target framework (when build is necessary).
  --configuration <CONFIGURATION>  The configuration to use (when build is necessary).
  --runtime <RUNTIME_IDENTIFIER>   The runtime to use (when build is necessary).
  --no-build                       Don't build the project. Only use this when the build is up-to-date.
  --version                        Show version information
  -?|-h|--help                     Show help information
  -v|--verbose                     Show verbose output.
  --no-color                       Don't colorize output.
  --prefix-output                  Prefix output with level.

.NET Core CLI tools for the Karambolo.AspNetCore.Bundling library 3.9.1+36150ca931463c525cc64ee0ce895983c6ee2a7f

Usage: dotnet bundle [options]

Options:
  -s|--sources <SOURCES>           Specifies where to look for bundle configurations. You may specify multiple values separated with comma. Possible values: None, ConfigFile, AppAssembly, Default, OutputAssemblies. Default: ConfigFile,AppAssembly.
  -f|--config-file <CONFIG_FILE>   The location of the bundle configuration file. (Ignored when ConfigFile source is not enabled by the '--sources' option.) See https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/aspnet/core/client-side/bundling-and-minification#configure-bundling-and-minification
  -m|--mode <MODE>                 Enable production optimizations or development hints. Possible values: Production, Development. Default: Production.
  -p|--project <PROJECT>           The location of the project directory or project file whose web assets needs to be bundled.
  --framework <FRAMEWORK>          The target framework (when build is necessary).
  --configuration <CONFIGURATION>  The configuration to use (when build is necessary).
  --runtime <RUNTIME_IDENTIFIER>   The runtime to use (when build is necessary).
  --no-build                       Don't build the project. Only use this when the build is up-to-date.
  --version                        Show version information
  -?|-h|--help                     Show help information
  -v|--verbose                     Show verbose output.
  --no-color                       Don't colorize output.
  --prefix-output                  Prefix output with level.
